license.title: License Activation
license.description: Enter the license key from your Gumroad purchase confirmation email. An internet connection is required.
license.removeConfirm: This will remove the license from this device. You will need to re-enter your key to use it again. Continue?

trial.expiredDescription: Your 30-day free trial has ended. Please enter a license key to continue.

sidebar.showAdvancedTabs: Show advanced sidebar tabs (Git, Graph, Backlinks, AI)
